_comment: Codex CLI pricing data, consumed by post-codex-debit.sh to convert NDJSON usage events into ledger cents. Rates are PLACEHOLDER and MUST be verified against https://openai.com/api/pricing/ before binding-mode rollout (PR-E activation). Cents-per-1k-tokens; the post-hook computes: cents = round((input_tokens * input_cents_per_1k + output_tokens * output_cents_per_1k) / 1000).
_verified_source: PLACEHOLDER — NOT verified against pricing page

gpt-5.5._note: Codex CLI 0.133.0 default model as of 2026-05. PLACEHOLDER rates pitched conservatively high so an under-debit during shadow rollout deny-trips early rather than late.
